subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Lufunjisho ka lo watanamo obewa nobe ufunda mwaila uno mutwe wa malwañano.
topics: Kamina: Nyimbo ke lubaji lwa kisho kyanema mu mutundu yense kabiji imbiwa mu bimye
Ntendekelo: Nyimbo ke lubaji lwa kisho kya mutundu yense kabiji imbiwa mu bimye
